mapper.select: SELECT B.BOM_NO as bomNo, B.PARENT_CD as parentCd, i1.ITEM_NM as parentNm, B.CHILD_CD as childCd, i2.ITEM_NM as childNm, B.REQ_QTY as reqQty FROM TB_BOM B LEFT JOIN TB_ITEM i1 ON B.PARENT_CD = i1.ITEM_CD LEFT JOIN TB_ITEM i2 ON B.CHILD_CD = i2.ITEM_CD ORDER BY B.REG_DT DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_BOM WHERE PARENT_CD = #{parentCd} AND CHILD_CD = #{childCd}
